title: Better screen
description: Adds a much needed UI upgrade.
body:
# Better screen
### Ever wanted to have BETTER UI?
### Well **now's** your chance!
With better hearts and food, you'll wonder why you never used this before!
## Even allows **custom** title panoramas!

<details>
<summary>Suggested mod</summary>

[Panorama screenshots](https://modrinth.com/mod/swd-panorama)
</details>

Enhanced hotbar and more!
